query_normalized: systematic assessment of non-coding variant effects on transcription factor binding affinities biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it investigates the same biological mechanism (transcription factor binding affinities and fractional occupancy) and explicitly models the effect of genetic variants (heterozygosity at cis-sites or TF coding regions) on these affinities, which is the core subject of the user's question.
